title: ChatGPT introduces holiday gifting suggestions
body_md: ChatGPT can now help draft personalized holiday gift suggestions based on conversation history. Available to Plus subscribers in time for the season.

title: Trying to grow tomatoes in a Bay Area microclimate
body_md: Notes from year three of trying to grow heirloom tomatoes in Half Moon Bay's fog. Photographs of the test plot inside.

title: Anthropic Q1 2026 financial highlights
body_md: Revenue up 4.2x year-over-year, paid seats now over 1.5M, infrastructure investment doubled. Standard quarterly business commentary, no product news.

title: DALL-E 4 image generation expanded to French and Japanese prompts
body_md: Image generation now supports French and Japanese with native prompt understanding. Cultural context retained in the generated images.

title: Tutorial: Build a recipe-recommendation chatbot in 50 lines
body_md: A short tutorial walking through building a recipe-recommendation chatbot. Uses LangChain's chat model interface and a curated recipe dataset.

title: Photos: a long weekend on the Lost Coast
body_md: Photos and a write-up from three days hiking the Lost Coast in northern California. Camera notes and trail logistics inside.

title: ChatGPT now supports custom alarm tones
body_md: Generate custom alarm tones from a text prompt and set them via voice. Plus subscribers in the iOS and Android apps starting today.

title: Anthropic opens new Tokyo office
body_md: Anthropic announces a new Tokyo office to support customers and partners across APAC. Hiring across business and technical roles.
